title: Brand Packaging Design Proposal Overview Board AI
sourceTitle: Brand Packaging Design Proposal Overview Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Horizontal 4:3 brand packaging design proposal overview for premium herbal snack gift set, presenting MOSS & RICE and the Forest Daily Bites series as a complete packaging system. Subject: The board shows one largest hero package plus 2-3 SKU extensions for black sesame crisp, osmanthus rice bar, ginger oat cookie, and green tea nut mix, using stand-up pouch, rigid gift box, bottle label, and shopping bag mockup as realistic printed mockups with clear edges, natural perspective, and unified light. Scene: Large main-color background with irregular color blocks, portfolio-board layout, product ingredients or symbolic props, and small moss rabbit mascot, rice grain stickers, leaf line art, and herbal ingredient icons appearing on packaging surfaces or sticker-like accents. Composition: Fixed proposal-board structure: largest main package as first focal point, secondary packages arranged around it, auxiliary gift or trial formats, central Chinese headline 新味上架, 01/02/03 labels, and small annotation zones. Signature Elements: Preserved brand packaging design proposal overview board source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Real brand packaging design proposal preview with portfolio polish, social-share appeal, series consistency, clean mockup collage, hand-drawn sketches, arrows, circles, line art, and commercial brand-system finish. Color Palette: colors serve the product theme and brand mood. Materials: Printed paper boxes, plastic pouches, cups, cans, bottle labels, shopping bags, gift boxes, stickers, and realistic packaging substrate texture. Typography: Chinese headline 新味上架 is central and readable; small English handwritten notes such as PACKAGE DESIGN, BRAND SYSTEM, and NEW FLAVOR appear sparingly; labels and numbers stay legible. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Brand Packaging Design Proposal Overview Board Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Horizontal 4:3 brand packaging design proposal overview for pet-friendly freeze-dried fruit snack line, presenting PAW BERRY and the Tiny Trail Treats series as a complete packaging system. Subject: The board shows one largest hero package plus 2-3 SKU extensions for strawberry cubes, banana bites, apple crisps, and yogurt drops, using resealable pouch, sample sachet, gift box, and paper cup mockup as realistic printed mockups with clear edges, natural perspective, and unified light. Scene: Large main-color background with irregular color blocks, portfolio-board layout, product ingredients or symbolic props, and round puppy mascot, berry stickers, paw-print doodles, and fruit sketch icons appearing on packaging surfaces or sticker-like accents. Composition: Fixed proposal-board structure: largest main package as first focal point, secondary packages arranged around it, auxiliary gift or trial formats, central Chinese headline 轻宠零食提案, 01/02/03 labels, and small annotation zones. Signature Elements: Preserved brand packaging design proposal overview board source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Real brand packaging design proposal preview with portfolio polish, social-share appeal, series consistency, clean mockup collage, hand-drawn sketches, arrows, circles, line art, and commercial brand-system finish. Color Palette: colors serve the product theme and brand mood. Materials: Printed paper boxes, plastic pouches, cups, cans, bottle labels, shopping bags, gift boxes, stickers, and realistic packaging substrate texture. Typography: Chinese headline 轻宠零食提案 is central and readable; small English handwritten notes such as PACKAGE DESIGN, BRAND SYSTEM, and NEW FLAVOR appear sparingly; labels and numbers stay legible. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
